scenarios.rationale: The operating system (AIX 7.2) is not covered by the provided lifecycle rules.

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch to standard Linux Operating System
scenarios.rationale: The application runs on AIX 7.2, so moving to standard Linux is a viable modernization path.
The current stack (AIX 7.2, FORTRAN 2018, ) is legacy and would make an ARM migration high risk.
The recorded server technology (none) is not a target application server replacement candidate in the provided rules.

scenarios.scenario_name: Application Migration to Cloud Infrastructure (Lift & Shift)
scenarios.rationale: The application is currently deployed as On-Premise, so lift-and-shift to cloud remains a valid option.
The legacy stack (AIX 7.2, FORTRAN 2018) makes near-term containerization difficult.
The application is custom-built, but the current data shows only moderate integration pressure for deeper refactoring.
The database version for DB2 is not covered by the supplied lifecycle rules.

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch DB Engine to open-source database solution
scenarios.rationale: The application uses a proprietary database (DB2), so an open-source alternative could reduce cost and lock-in.
Known components are current, but some technologies could not be dated from the available application data.
